queries.question: Show currency exchange and ATM machines located near gate 10.
queries.sql:
SELECT Financial_Services.Name 
FROM Financial_Services
WHERE (Financial_Services.Type = "Currency Exchange Service" OR Financial_Services.Type = "ATM Machine") AND Financial_Services.Location_Within_Terminal = "Near Gate 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?financial_services a :Financial_Services .
  ?financial_services p:name ?name .
  ?financial_services p:Type ?type_w .
  ?financial_services p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?financial_services p:Location_Within_Terminal ?location_within_terminal_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Currency Exchange Service" || STR(?type_w2) = "ATM Machine")) && STR(?location_within_terminal_w) = "Near Gate 10"))
}
